candidate.problem: README.md and docs/CLI.md still described repair JSON as returning prompt/recommendation pairs without documenting that prompt records are redacted.
candidate.risk: Operators could misunderstand stdout JSON safety boundaries after the repair JSON redaction change.
candidate.decision: Document redacted stdout prompt previews and redacted repair prompt/recommendation pairs while preserving the Markdown export distinction.

commands: rg -n "Stdout prompt previews are capped at 25 records and redacted|deterministic redacted prompt/recommendation pairs" README.md
rg -n "Stdout prompt records are redacted|returns redacted prompt/recommendation pairs" docs/CLI.md
verification.evidence: The README and CLI docs contain the redaction wording, and the diff whitespace check passed.
